description_en: Khartoum, in Sudan, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.2/5. Muslim travelers will find 9 halal restaurants listed, 150 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Khartoum: 9 halal restaurants listed, 150 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 4.2/5.
